DP.026.0000:
The Group Ranking Room is the one
closest to the stairs.\f
The room on the opposite side
is the Global Ranking Room.
DP.026.0001:
I just realized something!
It’s going to be great!\f
If I trade lots of Pokémon, I’ll get
a better chance at winning the\r
Pokémon Lottery!
DP.026.0002:
Records are fine things.
They tell you the history of stuff.\f
You can really sense the dramatic
stories behind all those numbers!
DP.026.0003:
Hey, there!
How’s it going?\f
I’m a TV producer here.
Are you watching TV?\f
So, let me ask you.
Will you tell me your opinion on TV?
DP.026.0004:
Oh, yeah?
That’s interesting.\f
Moving right along, what feedback
can you give me about TV?\f
DP.026.0005:
Oh, yeah?
That’s interesting.\f
Thanks for answering my questions.
I’ll file it away for reference.\f
Keep your channel tuned to
Jubilife TV!
DP.026.0006:
Oh, all right.\f
I can understand how busy it must
get for you.\f
It’d be cool if you could answer my
questions when you’ve got time.\f
See you again!
DP.026.0007:
...Oh?\f
The fact that you know that phrase
tells me you’re someone in the know.\f
You’re a Trainer, right?
I’ll pull some strings for you.\f
I think I can swing a deal to get you
a new wallpaper for your PC Boxes.\f
Make sure you keep your channel
tuned to Jubilife TV.
DP.026.0008:
...Oh?\f
The fact that you know that phrase
tells me you’re someone in the know.\f
You’re a Trainer, right?
I’ll pull some strings for you.\f
I think I can swing a deal so you
can receive a Mystery Gift.\f
Make sure you keep your channel
tuned to Jubilife TV.
